name: Mount Bohemia
exact_quote: 2 lifts: 1 triple chair and 1 double chair. Base 600'. Summit 1,500'. Vertical Drop 900'. Annual 110". Opening Dec 05, 2026 closing Apr 30, 2027. 105 runs across 650 Acres. Resort features the large outdoor hot tub, heated outdoor swimming pool, and steam room.
notes: OnTheSnow primary source. Snowmaking acres not listed.
